mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supply_inventory_movement WHERE item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT m.id, m.item_id, i.name AS item_name, i.category_id AS item_category_id, c.name AS category_name, m.movement_type, m.qty, m.stock_after, m.claim_id, m.claim_line_id, m.operator_user_id, m.applicant_user_id, m.remark, DATE_FORMAT(m.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM supply_inventory_movement m INNER JOIN supply_item i ON i.id = m.item_id AND i.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supply_category c ON c.id = i.category_id WHERE m.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
